div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Uruguay (Wright)
div.p: 22. The Department does not believe that there are grounds at this time for representations in the specific case of the American oil companies as reported in your despatch No. 596 of February 20,Not printed. but desires you to cable your views as to the utility of making representations to the Uruguayan Government with reference to the general discrimination against American trade, which you report is being practised in the matter of the allotment of controlled foreign exchange.
